name: Paul Chowdhry
bio: Paul Chowdhry is a British comedian and actor from London, widely regarded as one of the most successful British Indian stand-up comedians. Known for sharp crowd work and material on race and identity, he hosted Stand Up for the Week and twice headlined Live at the Apollo. In 2017 he became the first comedian of Asian heritage to sell out Wembley Arena.

timeline.ev: Headlines Live at the Apollo; releases Whats Happening White People
First Asian comedian to sell out Wembley Arena

accolades: First comedian of Asian heritage to sell out Wembley Arena (2017)
Twice headlined Live at the Apollo (2012 and 2015)
